action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed because torch.stack on variable-size node_features (different atoms per molecule). The code was trying to verify vocabulary sizes, but these are already hardcoded in model.py. Analysis: Remove the feature range computation from train.py, use predefined vocab sizes from model.py. The embedding-based model should significantly improve over linear encoding. Decision: Fix train.py, train from scratch for 80 epochs with the new embedding model.
